prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第23名，近年稳定在21–25名区间，属全国顶尖工科院校；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及校园安全事件（学生被校外人员殴打、校方被指偏袒）；抖音热度排名第74位（评价"一般"），综合热度约36.6万，短视频曝光量中等；未见明显投档断档记录；航空宇航科学与技术A+、计算机科学与技术A+、材料科学与工程A+、机械工程A、控制科学与工程A-、信息与通信工程A-、管理科学与工程A-，共7个A-及以上学科，在航空航天、计算机、材料等领域实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，与该校优势学科高度契合，推高报考热度；山西省2026年物理类考生约16.74万人，较2025年17.33万人减少约3.4%，竞争略有缓解；西北工业大学位于陕西西安，属邻省，对山西考生有天然地域便利；该校在山西省招生占比约4.7%（2025年），属中等偏上水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年计划缩招约10.9%加剧竞争、考生总数小幅减少（-3.4%）部分缓解压力、学校声誉偏负面但影响有限、优势学科与热门专业高度契合等因素，在2025年基准1691名基础上预计位次继续前移；预测最低位次约1600名，区间1360–1840名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 3330 → 2464 → 2102 → 2037 → 1691, showing a continuous upward trend (ranking numbers decreasing year by year). Over the past 4 years, the ranking has moved forward by about 1639 places, with competition intensifying annually. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 1691. The university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Shanxi Province was 138 in 2021, 137 in 2022, 138 in 2023, 134 in 2024, 128 in 2025, and 114 in 2026, a reduction of about 10.9% compared to 2025. This reduction will intensify competition and push the ranking forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 23rd, stable in the 21–25 range in recent years, making it a top-tier engineering institution in China. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to campus safety incidents (students assaulted by off-campus individuals, the university accused of favoritism). Its Douyin popularity ranking is 74th (rated 'average'), with a comprehensive popularity of about 366,000 and medium short video exposure. No significant admission gaps have been recorded. It has A+ disciplines in Aeronautical and Astronautical Science and Technology, Computer Science and Technology, and Materials Science and Engineering, A in Mechanical Engineering, A- in Control Science and Engineering, Information and Communication Engineering, and Management Science and Engineering, totaling 7 disciplines rated A- or above, demonstrating outstanding strength in aerospace, computer science, and materials.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, closely aligning with the university's advantageous disciplines, boosting application enthusiasm. In 2026, the number of physics category examinees in Shanxi Province is approximately 167,400, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,300 in 2025, slightly easing competition. Northwestern Polytechnical University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, a neighboring province, offering natural geographical convenience for Shanxi candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Shanxi is about 4.7% (2025), which is moderately high.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend in historical rankings, the approximately 10.9% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan intensifying competition, a slight decrease in the total number of examinees (-3.4%) partially alleviating pressure, a somewhat negative but limited impact of reputation, and a high alignment between advantageous disciplines and popular majors, the ranking is expected to continue moving forward from the 2025 baseline of 1691. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1600, with a range of 1360–1840.

If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 1360), prioritize aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors.
